dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.heroSubtitlePart1: Ready to design the future? You have
dashboard.heroSubtitlePart3: and your creative energy is high.
dashboard.instructionsSubtitle: Follow these steps to create your website
dashboard.step1Desc: Click on "New Project" and describe your business to generate your site with AI

dashboard.step3Desc: Browse professional templates in the "Templates" section of the menu
dashboard.step4Desc: Connect your domain or use our free hosting to publish
dashboard.step5Desc: Go to "Ecommerce" in the menu to add products, categories and start selling online
dashboard.ecommerceInstructionsSubtitle: Start selling online in a few steps
dashboard.ecommerceStep1Desc: Choose the project where you want to enable your online store
dashboard.ecommerceStep2Desc: Click "Activate Store" to enable ecommerce features for your project
dashboard.ecommerceStep3Desc: Create categories, add products with images, prices and inventory
dashboard.ecommerceStep4Desc: Set up Stripe, PayPal or cash on delivery in Settings > Payments
dashboard.ecommerceStep5Desc: Your products will appear on your website and customers can purchase them
dashboard.instructionsTip: 💡 You can close this guide and always see it again from settings

onboarding.title: Create Your Website
onboarding.subtitle: AI-powered website builder
onboarding.step1Subheading: Tell us about your business so we can create the perfect website.
onboarding.step2Subheading: Tell visitors what makes your business special.
onboarding.step3Subheading: What do you offer? Let AI suggest or add your own.
onboarding.step4Subheading: AI recommends the best template for your industry.
onboarding.step5Subheading: How can customers reach you? (All fields optional)
onboarding.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what your business does, your values, and what makes you unique...
onboarding.descriptionHint: This will be used to generate content for your website. Be as detailed as possible.
onboarding.taglinePlaceholder: A short catchy phrase for your business
onboarding.useAIOrAdd: Use AI to generate or add manually
onboarding.componentSettingsHint: Toggle components on/off based on your needs. AI has pre-selected the best options for your industry.
onboarding.pleaseWait: This may take a few minutes. Please wait...
onboarding.generatingContent: Creating personalized content for your website...
onboarding.websiteReadyDescription: Your website has been generated successfully. You can now customize it in the editor.
onboarding.errorGeneratingDescription: Failed to generate description. Please try again.
onboarding.errorGeneratingServices: Failed to generate services. Please try again.
onboarding.step1Tip: Select the industry that best describes your business. This helps our AI generate relevant content for your website.
onboarding.step2Tip: Let our AI generate a professional description, then customize it to match your voice. You can always edit it later in the website editor.
onboarding.step4Tip: The AI analyzes your industry and business type to suggest the most suitable template and components. You can always customize everything later in the editor.
onboarding.step5Tip: All fields are optional. Add what you'd like to display on your website. You can always update this information later.
onboarding.generationTip: Our AI is analyzing your business and generating personalized content. Each image is created specifically for your brand.
